User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user preferences and last used settings.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

lastOptions.description: The last used QR code options.

updatedAt.description: The last time the profile was updated.

HistoryItem.title: History Item
HistoryItem.description: A single QR code generation record.

id.description: Unique ID for the history item.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this.

options.description: The options used to generate the QR code.

timestamp.description: The time the QR code was generated.

label.description: A label for the QR code.
